steps.action: Phrase 1: Begin the Maloya dance in line formation with grounded steps on the beat with weight transfer through footwork.
steps.text: Phrase 1: Begin the Maloya dance in line formation with grounded steps on the beat with weight transfer through footwork.

steps.action: Phrase 2: Take two side steps, keep partner spacing, and turn back into the formation line.
steps.text: Phrase 2: Take two side steps, keep partner spacing, and turn back into the formation line.

steps.action: Phrase 3: Travel forward with measured steps, hold rhythm, and return on the next beats.
steps.text: Phrase 3: Travel forward with measured steps, hold rhythm, and return on the next beats.

steps.action: Phrase 4: Retreat one step, pivot through a turn, and face the dancers across the line.
steps.text: Phrase 4: Retreat one step, pivot through a turn, and face the dancers across the line.

steps.action: Phrase 5: Mark the rhythm with a clap, then step diagonally to keep circle balance.
steps.text: Phrase 5: Mark the rhythm with a clap, then step diagonally to keep circle balance.

steps.action: Phrase 6: Link with nearby dancers, move as a chain, and sustain even beat timing.
steps.text: Phrase 6: Link with nearby dancers, move as a chain, and sustain even beat timing.

steps.action: Phrase 7: Cross to the opposite side with quick steps, then turn and reset formation.
steps.text: Phrase 7: Cross to the opposite side with quick steps, then turn and reset formation.

steps.action: Phrase 8: Close the phrase with a final step and a steady dance cadence on the beat.
steps.text: Phrase 8: Close the phrase with a final step and a steady dance cadence on the beat.

steps.action: Phrase 9: Begin the Maloya dance in line formation with grounded steps on the beat.
steps.text: Phrase 9: Begin the Maloya dance in line formation with grounded steps on the beat.

steps.action: Phrase 10: Take two side steps, keep partner spacing, and turn back into the formation line.
steps.text: Phrase 10: Take two side steps, keep partner spacing, and turn back into the formation line.

steps.action: Phrase 11: Travel forward with measured steps, hold rhythm, and return on the next beats.
steps.text: Phrase 11: Travel forward with measured steps, hold rhythm, and return on the next beats.

steps.action: Phrase 12: Retreat one step, pivot through a turn, and face the dancers across the line.
steps.text: Phrase 12: Retreat one step, pivot through a turn, and face the dancers across the line.
